serviceMapping.marketDataHint: Source for price updates and charts.
serviceMapping.calendarSourceHint: Website to fetch news from (Scraping + AI).

keys.title: API Keys

profit.title: Profit RTD Connection
profit.description: Receive real-time quotes directly from Profit Chart via Excel.
profit.allAssetsSupport: Supports any B3 asset (PETR4, VALE3, etc)
profit.requirementDesc: The file must contain sheets: DADOS, BOOK [ASSET], PLAYERS. Profit must be exporting to this file.

currency.title: Currency Service
currency.description: Used to convert your balances and results to BRL in the Financial Hub. We use AwesomeAPI by default.
currency.hint: If the address changes in the future, you can update it here without touching the code.

assets.title: Assets
assets.description: Register traded assets (Symbol, Point Value, etc).

importDialog.description: Select the assets detected in your Profit file to add to the registry.
importDialog.noAssets: No new assets detected in RTD.

currencies.description: Register currencies used in your accounts (BRL, USD, etc).

fiscal.description: Configure tax rates (IRPF) for each asset type and modality.

form.exemptionHint: Monthly sales below this value exempt IR on profits.

mappings.description: Associate each Asset Type and Modality with a Tax Rule.

fees.description: Create cost profiles to apply to your strategies and trades.

form.description: Configure all costs involved in the operation.

strategies.description: Document your setups, entry rules, exit and management.

database.title: Manage Database
database.description: Tools to diagnose and manage the database.

status.title: Check Database Status
status.description: See how many records exist in each main table.

defaults.title: Restore System Defaults
defaults.description: Use this option if you notice that options like "Asset Types" or "Emotional States" are missing.
defaults.warning: Safe for use: This action checks the integrity of core system data and recreates only what is missing or incorrect. Your trades and accounts will NOT be deleted.
defaults.confirm: This will check and fix missing default data (Currencies, Asset Types, etc.), without erasing your data. Do you wish to continue?

demo.title: Demo Data
demo.description: Generate or remove sample trades to test features.
demo.deleteWarning: Warning: This action will permanently remove trades from selected accounts.
demo.confirmDeleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete demo data? This action cannot be undone.
demo.successClean: All demo trades have been removed!
demo.selectAccount: Please select at least one account

danger.title: Danger Zone: Full Reset
danger.description: Erases all data and recreates the database from scratch with factory data.
danger.warning: CAUTION: All your trades, accounts, and customizations will be lost.
danger.confirm: WARNING: This will erase ALL data (Trades, Accounts, Settings) and recreate the database with initial sample data. Are you absolutely sure?

markets.title: Markets
markets.description: Register exchanges and markets you trade (B3, Nasdaq, Forex...).

form.description: Configure basic information and trading sessions.
form.name: Name

management.title: License Management
management.subtitle: Generate and manage identity-based licenses to protect your sales.
management.removeConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove this license? You will return to the trial period or lose access if it has already expired.

step1.title: Generate Request PIN
step1.desc: Make sure your Profile data is correct.
step1.pinLabel: Your Unique PIN (Linked to this machine)
step1.hint: Send this PIN to support to receive your .lic license file.
step1.footer: * The PIN is generated from your SSN/Tax ID and hardware identification (BIOS).

step2.title: Activate from File
step2.desc: Load the received file to unlock the system.
step2.invalidMsg: Invalid license file for this machine.

benefits.title: Lifetime License Benefits
benefits.benefit1: Unlimited access to all journal and backtest tools.
benefits.benefit2: Automatic sync of quotes and assets.

identity_lock.title: Identity Lock
identity_lock.desc: Bound to Name and ID. Impossible to share.

hardware_lock.title: Tied to Device and ID
hardware_lock.desc: Extreme anti-piracy based on machine and documents.

1.title: Collect Data
1.desc: The client provides Name, ID, and Birth Date in onboarding.

2.title: Generate License
2.desc: You use the private key to generate the official license.

3.title: Validate Offline
3.desc: The app validates the signature against the built-in public key without internet.

new_license.modalDesc: Enter customer data to generate a new key.
new_license.name: Full Name

delete.title: Delete License
delete.desc: Are you sure you want to permanently delete this license from the database? The client will lose access on the next online validation.

banner.getLicensePrompt: You need an active license to continue.
